@@ -10,1340 +10,66 @@
 ain%0A
-%0A
 import 
-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22strconv%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc backtrack(idx int, somaAtual int, alvo int, n int, arr %5B%5Dint) bool %7B%0A%0A    //caso base 1: se a somaAtual, ou seja, acumulado pelas escolhas anteiores for igual ao alvo, significa que o subconjubto atual funciona%0A    if somaAtual == alvo %7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A%0A    //caso base 2: se a soma j%C3%A1 passou do alvo, qualquer numero adicionado dps vai aumentar a soma ainda mais, logo %C3%A9 imposs%C3%ADvel chegar ao alvo se j%C3%A1 passou dele, voltameos. Se o indice chegou ao fim e n%C3%A3o parou no caso um, a soma n%C3%A3o bateu!%0A    if somaAtual %3E alvo %7C%7C idx %3E= n %7B%0A        return false%0A    %7D%0A%0A    if backtrack(idx+1, somaAtual+arr%5Bidx%5D, alvo, n, arr) %7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A%0A    if backtrack(idx+1, somaAtual, alvo, n, arr) %7B%0A        return true%0A    %7D%0A%0A    return false%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%0A    if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A        return %0A    %7D%0A%0A    l1 := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A    n, _:= strconv.Atoi(l1%5B0%5D)%0A    k, _:= strconv.Atoi(l1%5B0%5D)%0A%0A    if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A        return %0A    %7D%0A%0A    l2 := strings.Fields(scanner.Text())%0A%0A    arr := make(%5B%5Dint, n)%0A%0A    for i := 0; i %3C n; i++ %7B%0A        arr%5Bi%5D, _ = strconv.Atoi(l2%5Bi%5D)%0A    %7D%0A%0A    if backtrack(0, 0, k, n, arr) %7B%0A        fmt.Println(%22true%22)%0A    %7D else %7B%0A        fmt.Println(%22false%22)%0A    %7D
+%22fmt%22%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    fmt.Println(%22Hello, World!%22)
 %0A%7D%0A
